cited_facts.why_it_matters: The amendment is explicitly marked as OBSOLETE/removed in the Known Amendments status, indicating it is no longer a valid candidate for activation.
The amendment was disabled in v3.1.1 due to a bug and is superseded by BatchV1_1, confirming its retired status.

output_json.decision_summary: The amendment fixBatchInnerSigs is explicitly identified as obsolete and removed in the source facts. It was disabled due to a bug and replaced by a future release (BatchV1_1). According to the task rule, REJECT is the correct route for retired/obsolete proposals.
output_json.forbidden_stronger_claim: This amendment is active and requires immediate voting.

validator_work_item.recommended_validator_action: Ignore this amendment as it is obsolete and has been replaced.
validator_work_item.title: Reject obsolete amendment fixBatchInnerSigs
